meaning: n.北海道(位于日本北部一岛)
examples: The Ainu settlers in Hokkaido are the last remnant of a prehistoric race.
Hoelldobler and Wilson's magnificent work for ant lovers, The Ants, describes a supercolony of the ant Formica yessensis on the Ishikari Coast of Hokkaido.
A diver explores an ice canopy off Hokkaido, Japan.
For chill seekers wanting to stay closer to home, hiking in Hokkaido is always a possibility.
Shiretoko Peninsula is located in the north-east of Hokkaido, the northernmost island of Japan.
